description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a striking combination of dark and wood-textured exterior panels. The front facade features expansive floor-to-ceiling glass windows, allowing for abundant natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. Two balconies with glass railings extend from the upper floor, each furnished with outdoor seating and potted plants. The ground level includes a main entryway flanked by large potted plants and a series of stepping stones leading to the door. The rear and side facades are more subdued, with a mix of large and narrow windows and a continuation of the wood-textured cladding. The house sits on a neatly manicured green lawn, emphasizing its urban, upscale character.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large glass windows, and wood-textured exterior panels, featuring balconies and a manicured lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing large glass windows, two balconies with glass railings, potted plants, and the main entryway with stepping stones.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wood-textured panels, a balcony with outdoor furniture, and a single large potted plant near the entry.
description_view_2: Rear view with a mix of large and narrow windows, subdued wood-textured cladding, and a simple green lawn.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the second balcony, more glass windows, and the continuation of the modern facade.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a glass door, flanked by large potted plants, accessed via stepping stones, and no porch or overhang.
